apiKey.label: apiKey
apiKey.description: An API key which has write permissions to the Algolia Insights API

queryIdQueryStringName.label: QueryID QueryString Name
queryIdQueryStringName.description: QueryString name you use for when storing the Algolia QueryID in a page URL.

productClickedEvents.title: Product Clicked Events
productClickedEvents.description: When a product is clicked within an Algolia Search, Recommend or Predict result

objectID.label: Product ID
objectID.description: Populates the ObjectIds field in the Algolia Insights API. Product ID of the clicked item.

index.label: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

queryID.label: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was clicked.

position.label: Position
position.description: Position of the click in the list of Algolia search results. Positions should start from 1, not 0.

userToken.label: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

authenticatedUserToken.label: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

extraProperties.label: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Product Clicked'

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'click'

conversionEvents.title: Conversion Events
conversionEvents.description: In ecommerce, conversions are purchase or add-to-cart events often but not always involving multiple products. Outside of ecommerce, a conversion can be any positive signal associated with an index record. Query ID is optional and indicates that the event is the result of a search query.

products.label: Product Details
products.description: Populates the ObjectIDs field in the Algolia Insights API. An array of objects representing the purchased items. Each object must contain a product_id field.

index.label: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

queryID.label: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was purchased.

userToken.label: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

authenticatedUserToken.label: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

value.label: Value
value.description: The value of the cart that is being converted.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the objects associated with the event in 3-letter ISO 4217 format. Required when `value` or `price` is set.

extraProperties.label: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Conversion Event'

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'conversion'

productViewedEvents.title: Product Viewed Events
productViewedEvents.description: Product view events act as a positive signal for associated record objects — the associated Product ID. Query ID is optional and indicates that the view event is the result of a search query.

objectID.label: Product ID
objectID.description: Product ID of the viewed item.

index.label: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

queryID.label: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was viewed.

userToken.label: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

authenticatedUserToken.label: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

extraProperties.label: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Product Viewed'

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'view'

productAddedEvents.title: Product Added Events
productAddedEvents.description: Product added events for ecommerce use cases for a customer adding an item to their cart. Query ID is optional and indicates that the event was the result of a search query.

product.label: Product ID
product.description: Populates the ObjectIds field in the Algolia Insights API with a single ObjectId (productId) of the product added.

index.label: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

queryID.label: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was purchased.

userToken.label: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user.

authenticatedUserToken.label: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

extraProperties.label: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Add to cart'

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'conversion'

productListFilteredEvents.title: Product List Filtered Events
productListFilteredEvents.description: When a product list is filtered within an Algolia Search

filters.label: Filters
filters.description: Populates the filters field in the Algolia Insights API, a list of up to 10 facet filters. Field should be an array of strings with format ${attribute}:${value}.

index.label: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

queryID.label: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was clicked.

userToken.label: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

authenticatedUserToken.label: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

extraProperties.label: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Product List Filtered'

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'click'

productListViewedEvents.title: Product List Viewed Events
productListViewedEvents.description: Product list viewed events act as a positive signal for associated record objects — the associated Product IDs. Query ID is optional and indicates that the view events are the result of a search query.

products.label: Product Details
products.description: The viewed products. Populates the ObjectIDs field in the Algolia Insights API. Each object must contain a product_id field.

product_id.label: product_id
product_id.description: The unique ID of the product.

index.label: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

queryID.label: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the items were viewed.

userToken.label: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

authenticatedUserToken.label: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

extraProperties.label: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

eventName.label: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Product List Viewed'

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'view'

algoliaPlugin.title: Algolia Browser Plugin
algoliaPlugin.description: Enriches all Segment payloads with the Algolia query_id value
algoliaPlugin.defaultSubscription: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"

presets.name: Algolia Plugin
presets.subscribe: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "group" or type = "page" or type = "alias"

presets.name: Send product clicked events to Algolia
Send an add-to-cart event to Algolia
Send product viewed events to Algolia
Send product list filtered events to Algolia
Send product list viewed events to Algolia
